command: /bin/bash -lc "grep -nEi 'BOS|game-api|approval|deployment' elixir/README.md | tail -n 80; git diff --check; git diff --stat; git status --short"
outputSummary:
31:If Codex reports that operator input, approval, or MCP elicitation is required, Symphony keeps the
151:  - `codex.approval_policy` defaults to `{"reject":{"sandbox_approval":true,"rules":true,"mcp_elicitations":true}}`
154:- Supported `codex.approval_policy` values depend on the targeted Codex app-server version. In the current local Codex schema, string values include `untrusted`, `on-failure`, `on-request`, and `never`, and object-form `reject` is also supported.
 elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/game_api/client.ex      |  29 +++++
 .../symphony_elixir/post_approval_coordinator.ex   |  64 +++++++++-
 .../post_approval_coordinator_test.exs             | 139 ++++++++++++++++++++-
 3 files changed, 228 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
 M elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/game_api/client.ex
 M elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/post_approval_coordinator.ex
 M elixir/test/symphony_elixir/post_approval_coordinator_test.exs
